JanConnect

Identity & OAuth Connection Hub

A secure identity provider featuring stateless JWT-based sessions, cookie-based refresh tokens, password encryption, and multi-provider OAuth2 integrations.

Secure Identity Management

Industry-standard Bcrypt password hashing and custom JWT filter protection.

Refresh Token Rotation

Secure, HttpOnly refresh cookies storing unique UUID sessions in PostgreSQL.

Google & YouTube Scope Linking

Directly links Google identities with custom YouTube and YT-Analytics scopes.
